title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.016 - Job training or development contracts or reimbursement for services, department to reimburse contractors
text:
620.016.  Job training or development contracts or reimbursement for services, department to reimburse contractors. — When the department of economic development contracts or reimburses entities for services related in any way to job training and development programs directly provided to individuals, the department shall reimburse the contractor as provided in the contract.
(L. 1997 2d Ex. Sess. S.B. 1 § 16) 
Effective 12-23-97
